overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character navigating Night City's neon-lit downtown district at night. The character ascends stairs from a covered area into an open plaza, then walks along wet streets past holographic advertisements before crossing a busy intersection with other pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stairway exit with vertical neon lighting

events.description: character ascends stairs and approaches exit from covered structure into open plaza
character reaches top of stairs and transitions from ascending to forward walking

agents.ego_description: character jogging up wide concrete stairs exiting a building with yellow backpack

notable_agents.action: NPC descending stairs toward camera wearing dark clothing
NPC standing at top of stairs near exit

entered.detail: tall vertical orange neon light strip running alongside the staircase
wide concrete staircase with multiple steps leading upward
tall futuristic buildings with illuminated windows and neon signage visible at top of stairs

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a concrete staircase from a dark interior space, passing NPCs coming the opposite direction. Vertical orange neon pillars line the left side of the stairs, and the glow of Night City's skyline becomes visible at the top of the stairs as the character approaches the exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with holographic advertisements and wet reflective pavement

events.description: character passes large holographic billboard displaying blue imagery on the right
character turns slightly right to follow plaza path toward street

agents.ego_description: walking through wet plaza passing pedestrians and observing holographic advertisements

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white jacket walking past ego from left to right
pedestrian in orange outfit standing near plaza railing

entered.detail: large floating holographic advertisement with blue glowing imagery
cylindrical building or kiosk structure in the plaza center
shiny wet tiled ground reflecting neon lights from surrounding buildings
low railing separating pedestrian plaza from street level

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a wide open plaza with wet pavement reflecting the neon lights of Night City. Large holographic billboards float above, and various pedestrians walk through the space. The character passes a circular kiosk structure and approaches a blue railing overlooking the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated sidewalk with traffic barriers overlooking multi-lane street

events.description: vehicle with headlights passes by on the street below the sidewalk
approaching intersection with traffic lights and crosswalk markings becoming visible

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated sidewalk next to street with light traffic and neon storefronts

notable_agents.action: car driving on street below with headlights illuminating the wet road
pedestrian walking alongside ego in same direction

entered.detail: trees with green foliage planted along the street edge
overhead traffic signal gantry with red lights illuminated
various illuminated storefront signs with pink and blue neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an elevated sidewalk separated from the street by blue barriers. The wet pavement reflects red neon lights from traffic signals and surrounding buildings. Sparse pedestrians walk in the same direction, and occasional vehicles pass on the street below as the character approaches an intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with yellow striped pedestrian crosswalk and red traffic signals

events.description: character arrives at crosswalk and waits as traffic light shows red
character begins crossing the street with a group of pedestrians
vehicle passes through intersection while group is crossing

agents.ego_description: waiting at crosswalk then crossing the street with a group of pedestrians while observing traffic

notable_agents.action: woman in bright blue pants and green top waiting at crosswalk then crossing
man in yellow plaid shirt crossing the street with ego

entered.detail: brightly painted yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing on the road
tall pole with red traffic signals and additional lighting fixtures
curved modern building with illuminated windows and neon trim
red construction crane structure visible above the buildings

segments.scene_description: The character reaches a busy intersection with a yellow striped crosswalk. After waiting for the signal, the character crosses the street with a group of pedestrians including a man in a plaid shirt and a woman in blue pants. Red traffic lights glow overhead, and a construction crane is visible against the night sky as vehicles pass through the intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character ascends from a dim interior into the vibrant, neon-drenched expanse of a futuristic city plaza. It begins with the character climbing a concrete staircase lined with orange neon pillars, passing oncoming pedestrians as the distant skyline glows at the top of the exit. As the character emerges, the scene opens into a wide plaza where wet pavement reflects floating holographic billboards and the camera glides past a circular kiosk toward a blue railing. The movement then shifts along an elevated sidewalk, following the character past red neon reflections and passing vehicles before approaching a busy urban crossing. Finally, the camera follows the character across a yellow striped crosswalk amidst a crowd of pedestrians, with red traffic lights and a distant construction crane framing the night sky.
